heading: Regulations
label: 5368 Regulations
text: The Board of Governors shall have authority to issue regulations to implement parts A and C and the amendments made thereunder. Except as otherwise specified in part A or C, not later than 18 months after the effective date of this Act, the Board of Governors shall issue final regulations to implement parts A and C, and the amendments made thereunder.
notes: References in TextPart C, referred to in text, was in the original “subtitle C”, meaning subtitle C (§§ 161–176) of title I of , , , which is classified principally to this part. For complete classification of subtitle C to the Code, see Tables.Pub.
